zh.lifeSummary: 當Honora Rogers於1562年出生在英國多瑟特布陽斯頓時，她的父親Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset36歲，母親Cecilia Luttrel39歲。她於1582年7月1日之前與Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1608年2月28日在英國英格蘭多瑟特布陽斯頓享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Honora Rogers于1562年出生在英国多瑟特布陽斯頓时，她的父亲Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset36岁，母亲Cecilia Luttrel39岁。她于1582年7月1日之前与Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1608年2月28日在英国英格兰多瑟特布陽斯頓享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rogers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Roger , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: adopted for Gaelic Mac Ruaidhrí (see Rorie ).

History: Thomas Rogers (c. 1587–1621), born in London, England, was among the Pilgrim Fathers who sailed on the Mayflower in 1620. He died during the first winter at Plymouth Colony, but his son Joseph survived and married, and was later joined in MA by his brother John. This name was subsequently brought to North America independently by many different bearers.

variants.name: Roger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alcee, Armand, Laurent, Leonce, Marcel, Yves, Clovis, Fernand, Gilberte, Janvier, Jean Claude.

Scottish, English, North German, French, Walloon, Catalan, and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements hrōd ‘renown’ +gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, which was introduced into England by the Normans in the form Rog(i)er and was reinforced by the Old Norse cognate Hróthgeirr.

History: Gabriel Roger from Sainte-Verge in Deux-Sèvres, France, married Marie (de) Lacour in Quebec City, QC, in 1669. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Rodgers
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Rogers  .

nameMeanings.name: Honora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: elaboration of   Honor  , used mainly in Ireland.

variants.name: Honorah
meanings: elaboration of   Honor  , used mainly in Ireland.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Honora Rogers was born in 1562, in Bryanston, Dorset, England, her father, Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset, was 36 and her mother, Cecilia Luttrel, was 39. She married Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp before 1 July 1582, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 28 February 1608, in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Honora Rogers est née en 1562, à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Luttrel, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp avant 1 juillet 1582, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 février 1608, à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

Lei sposato Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp prima del 1 luglio 1582, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. ko.Tower of London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 타워 프 런던
ko.lifeSummary: Honora Rogers(이)가 1562년 영국 도르세트 브라이아스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecilia Luttrel(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1582년 7월 1일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1608년 2월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브라이아스턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp antes 1 de julho de 1582, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Tower of London, England: тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Honora Rogers родилась в 1562 г. в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Luttrel, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp перед 1 июля 1582 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 28 февраля 1608 г. в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

Se casó con Edward Seymour Viscount Beauchamp antes de 1 de julio de 1582, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1608, en Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años.
